goal: define the frozen P0 requirements for the case module list, detail, lifecycle actions, and permission model so a single case can be managed end to end with gate-based control and auditability
must_have: case list page with the specified columns, default filters, and bulk actions
case detail page with 10 tabs covering overview, basics, documents, forms, tasks, deadlines, validation/submission, billing, communications, and logs
case creation that generates a case record, a template-driven document checklist, and enters stage S1
family-case batch creation that creates one case per main applicant and binds required case parties
gate-driven actions for stage advancement, validation, submission-package generation, receipt upload, archive, and payment registration
document handling based on local archive registration with relative path and version metadata
submission-package locking with correction-package linkage and immutable historical references
permission behavior constrained by role, group, and owner/collaborator visibility
out_of_scope: advanced reports such as correction rate, success rate, and completion duration
business_rules: P0 uses only management stages S1-S9 and does not enable CaseWorkflowStep UI
Gate-A, Gate-B, and Gate-C are authoritative and must align with the referenced rule and process documents
approved required documents count toward completion, and waived items are removed from the denominator
document upload wording in P0 means registering a local-server document version, not storing SaaS file binaries
submission packages lock referenced document versions, form versions, and key field snapshots and cannot be overwritten after submission
arrears status is warning-mode by default and requires explicit risk confirmation trace before continuing submission
after S9, all fields except logs are read-only
cross-group case creation requires a reason and audit trail
edge_cases: empty case list with guided create entry
gate validation failure with visible blockers and repair entry points
overdue document items triggering reminders and overdue highlighting
correction notice creating correction tasks and a linked correction submission package
submission while arrears risk exists only after risk confirmation is recorded
acceptance_criteria: the list page renders the required case fields, filters, and bulk actions
the detail page exposes the required 10 tabs and their defined fields/actions
creating a case creates a Case, generates the checklist, and enters S1
family batch creation creates one case per main applicant and binds required CaseParty relations
validation and stage progression produce ValidationRun and SubmissionPackage records in line with Gate-A/B/C
document registration stores local archive path and version metadata rather than SaaS file binaries
billing views expose total, receivable, received, outstanding, and payment records
visibility and edit permissions match the administrator, lead, assistant, and finance matrix
